name: Taylor Meadows Golf Club
about: Taylor Meadows Golf Club is a premier golf destination in Metro Detroit, offering both traditional outdoor golf experiences and a state-of-the-art indoor simulator program. The facility features a full 18-hole course designed by renowned architect Arthur Hills, alongside the 'iGolf Taylor' simulator program powered by top-of-the-line TrackMan technology. The venue caters to a wide range of golfers, from beginners learning the basics to seasoned players looking to improve their game, with options for on-course play, simulator sessions, golf lessons, and various events.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan simulator technology for realistic indoor play
Designed by Arthur Hills, offering a challenging and well-regarded course
Comprehensive options including leagues, lessons, and events for all skill levels
Greenside Grill provides a full dining experience on-site

food_and_drink.notes: Full dining service available at Greenside Grill
Full bar service available at Greenside Grill

simulator_hardware.notes: Top-of-the-line TrackMan Golf Simulators, widely considered the best indoor golf experience available

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs or the facility may provide rental equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted, but the Greenside Grill offers a full dining and bar menu.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: Simulator sessions are typically booked by the hour, allowing players to determine how many holes they complete within their time slot.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Taylor Meadows Golf Club is family-friendly and offers programs suitable for junior golfers.
